name: MOKUTON: MOKUJOU HEKI NO JUTSU (WOOD RELEASE: WOOD LOCKING WALL TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Using the ability to control Mokuton techniques, the user will form hand seals and cause beams of wood to emerge from the ground. The beams can converge to form a half spherical barrier to deflect an incoming blast. The sphere has 1.5 hit points per level of the user, 10 points of hardness and an Earth and Water resistance of 15. Any ray, cone, burst, line of effect or spread effect that deals enough damage to destroy the Mokujou Heki no Jutsu, continues until its maximum range is reached, which means that creatures standing behind the barrier when the barrier is destroyed may receive full impact from that attack. This technique can also be used once per round as an instant action, against opponents of ECL up to 1, when any ranged attack, ray, cone, burst, line of effect or spread effect is aimed at the user or on the area he stands. The Perform DC on that case is equal to the Perform check of the used technique or equal to the attack roll result, in case of ranged attacks. When using the technique as an instant action, the cost can't be converted to hit points.

Requires: Kantoku no Jutsu (t)

Effect: 10 feet radius demisphere centered at the user

Expendable Component: Expendable Component -Nearby wood to form the barrier.

Mastery: Every step of mastery on this technique increases the maximum ECL to the nearest unit of 5. The cost to perform the technique also increases by 2 every step (12 on ECL 6-10. 14 on ECL 11-15, etc.). Every step of mastery on this technique also increases the hit points of the barrier by 0.5 per level.
